info.name: TicketBox FULL Demo API
info.description: Full importable collection for TicketBox backend demo. Run folders in order after docker compose is up. Includes seeded IDs, auth tokens, order/payment, notifications, MailHog, RabbitMQ management, staff check-in, admin, and organizer revenue flows.

exec: function iso(offsetDays, offsetHours) { return new Date(now + offsetDays * day + (offsetHours || 0) * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(); }

item.name: Utility - Wait For Payment Async Listeners

exec: pm.test('Async wait health check', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

request.description: Blocks for about 2 seconds before calling health. This gives Modulith/RabbitMQ listeners time to issue tickets, create notifications, and send email.

exec: var json = {}; try { json = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {}
pm.test('Order status is PAID', function () { if (json.data && json.data.status) pm.expect(json.data.status).to.eql('PAID'); });

item.name: Staff - Guest List Lookup Not Found Sample

request.description: First run should return SUCCESS. Re-running the same seeded QR should return FAILED because the ticket becomes USED.

item.name: Staff - Online Scan USED_C Expected Failed Business Result

request.description: First run should accept VALID_A. Re-running should skip it because the ticket was already used.

item.name: Utility - Wait For Revenue Payment Async Listeners

exec: pm.test('Async wait health check', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

request.description: Blocks for about 2 seconds before calling health. This gives Modulith/RabbitMQ listeners time to issue tickets, create notifications, and send email.
